title: Apply structural principles to Class 10 buildings
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply structural principles to Class 10 buildings demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Analyse the structural integrity of building project

pcs.text: Determine class of building, intended use and climate zone from the NCC
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine class of building, intended use and climate zone from the NCC?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine class of building, intended use and climate zone from the NCC.

pcs.text: Analyse project compliance with NCC bushfire, high wind, earthquake and alpine environment requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse project compliance with NCC bushfire, high wind, earthquake and alpine environment requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse project compliance with NCC bushfire, high wind, earthquake and alpine environment requirements.

pcs.text: Analyse building design and structural integrity from plans and specifications, building construction codes and Australian Standards

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse building design and structural integrity from plans and specifications, building construction codes and Australian Standards.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the effect of section properties on various materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the effect of section properties on various materials.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if structural performance meets NCC general requirements and performance requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm analysis with industry design and building construction professionals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm analysis with industry design and building construction professionals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm analysis with industry design and building construction professionals.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-commencement site inspection to confirm analysis.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess new and emerging building technologies for application to the construction process and compliance with NCC requirements and Australian Standards.
